Auto
GitHub

  • HTMX Integration
  • Templates

Examples

  • Login Page
  • Products DataTable

Layout

  • App / Page / Drawer
  • Grid System
  • Header & Footer

  • Split Pane

Visualization

  • QR Code

  • Audio Player
  • Video Player
  • Image Crop
  • Calendar
  • Calendar Views
  • Kanban

  • Chart

  • Scheduler

Navigation

  • Navbar
  • Menu / Dropdown

  • Mega Menu
  • Breadcrumbs
  • Pagination
  • Tabs
  • Tab Bar
  • Category Tabs
  • Segment
  • Stepper
  • Context Menu
  • Command Palette
  • Infinite Scroll
  • Load More

Data Input

  • Checkbox / Radio / Toggle

UX v3.0

Attendance List

Employee attendance tracking list with status badges, summary statistics, search and filter toolbar, clock times, and work hours.

Full List with Summary Stats

Preview

Daily Attendance

24 Present
3 Absent
5 Late
2 On Leave
8 Remote
AM
Ana Martinez Engineering
Present
In 08:55
Out --:--
5h 12m
CR
Carlos Ruiz Design
Late
In 09:23
Out --:--
4h 44m
LG
Laura Garcia Sales
Remote
In 08:30
Out --:--
5h 37m
PL
Pedro Lopez HR
Absent
In --:--
Out --:--
MF
Maria Fernandez Finance
On Leave
In --:--
Out --:--
Showing 5 of 42 employees ERPlora HR - Feb 7, 2026 
<div class="attendance-list">
  <div class="attendance-list-header">
    <div class="attendance-list-header-row">
      <h2 class="attendance-list-title">Daily Attendance</h2>
      <div class="attendance-list-date">
        <input type="date" class="attendance-list-date-input" value="2026-02-07">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="attendance-list-summary">
    <div class="attendance-list-stat attendance-list-stat-present">
      <span class="attendance-list-stat-value">24</span>
      <span class="attendance-list-stat-label">Present</span>
    </div>
    <div class="attendance-list-stat attendance-list-stat-absent">
      <span class="attendance-list-stat-value">3</span>
      <span class="attendance-list-stat-label">Absent</span>
    </div>
    <div class="attendance-list-stat attendance-list-stat-late">
      <span class="attendance-list-stat-value">5</span>
      <span class="attendance-list-stat-label">Late</span>
    </div>
    <div class="attendance-list-stat attendance-list-stat-leave">
      <span class="attendance-list-stat-value">2</span>
      <span class="attendance-list-stat-label">On Leave</span>
    </div>
    <div class="attendance-list-stat attendance-list-stat-remote">
      <span class="attendance-list-stat-value">8</span>
      <span class="attendance-list-stat-label">Remote</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="attendance-list-body">
    <div class="attendance-list-item">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">AM</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Ana Martinez</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">Engineering</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-present">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        Present
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">In</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">08:55</span>
        </div>
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">Out</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">--:--</span>
        </div>
        <span class="attendance-list-work-hours">5h 12m</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="attendance-list-item">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">CR</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Carlos Ruiz</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">Design</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-late">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        Late
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">In</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time attendance-list-clock-time-late">09:23</span>
        </div>
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">Out</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">--:--</span>
        </div>
        <span class="attendance-list-work-hours attendance-list-work-hours-under">4h 44m</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="attendance-list-item">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">LG</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Laura Garcia</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">Sales</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-remote">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        Remote
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">In</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">08:30</span>
        </div>
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">Out</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">--:--</span>
        </div>
        <span class="attendance-list-work-hours attendance-list-work-hours-over">5h 37m</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="attendance-list-item">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">PL</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Pedro Lopez</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">HR</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-absent">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        Absent
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">In</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">--:--</span>
        </div>
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">Out</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">--:--</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="attendance-list-item">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">MF</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Maria Fernandez</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">Finance</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-leave">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        On Leave
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">In</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">--:--</span>
        </div>
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">Out</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">--:--</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="attendance-list-footer">
    <span>Showing 5 of 42 employees</span>
    <span>ERPlora HR - Feb 7, 2026</span>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div class="flex flex-col w-full overflow-hidden bg-base-100 rounded-box border border-base-300">
  <!-- Header -->
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-4 p-6 border-b border-base-300">
    <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
      <h2 class="font-semibold text-lg m-0">Daily Attendance</h2>
      <input type="date" class="px-4 py-2 border border-base-300 rounded-field text-sm bg-base-100" value="2026-02-07">
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Summary -->
  <div class="grid grid-cols-5 gap-2 px-6 py-4 bg-base-200 border-b border-base-300">
    <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 bg-base-100 rounded-field">
      <span class="text-xl font-bold text-success tabular-nums">24</span>
      <span class="text-xs font-medium uppercase text-base-content/60">Present</span>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 bg-base-100 rounded-field">
      <span class="text-xl font-bold text-error tabular-nums">3</span>
      <span class="text-xs font-medium uppercase text-base-content/60">Absent</span>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 bg-base-100 rounded-field">
      <span class="text-xl font-bold text-warning tabular-nums">5</span>
      <span class="text-xs font-medium uppercase text-base-content/60">Late</span>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 bg-base-100 rounded-field">
      <span class="text-xl font-bold text-info tabular-nums">2</span>
      <span class="text-xs font-medium uppercase text-base-content/60">On Leave</span>
    </div>
    <div class="flex flex-col items-center gap-1 p-2 bg-base-100 rounded-field">
      <span class="text-xl font-bold text-secondary tabular-nums">8</span>
      <span class="text-xs font-medium uppercase text-base-content/60">Remote</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Items -->
  <div class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
    <div class="flex items-center gap-4 px-6 py-4 border-b border-base-300 hover:bg-base-200 transition">
      <div class="w-11 h-11 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-content flex items-center justify-center font-semibold shrink-0">AM</div>
      <div class="flex-1 min-w-0"><div class="font-medium truncate">Ana Martinez</div><div class="text-sm text-base-content/60">Engineering</div></div>
      <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase bg-success/10 text-success"><span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-current"></span>Present</span>
      <div class="flex flex-col items-end gap-0.5 text-sm tabular-nums"><span>In: 08:55</span><span>Out: --:--</span><span class="text-xs text-base-content/60">5h 12m</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="flex items-center justify-between px-6 py-4 bg-base-200 border-t border-base-300 text-sm text-base-content/60">
    <span>Showing 5 of 42 employees</span>
    <span>ERPlora HR - Feb 7, 2026</span>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// Date picker change handler
document.querySelector('.attendance-list-date-input')?.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
  // Fetch attendance data for the selected date
  const date = e.target.value;
  console.log('Load attendance for:', date);
});

// Row click handler
document.querySelectorAll('.attendance-list-item').forEach(item => {
  item.addEventListener('click', () => {
    // Show employee detail or time log
  });
});

Filter Toolbar

Preview

Team Attendance

AM
Ana Martinez Engineering
Present
In 08:55
Out --:--
5h 12m
JS
Juan Sanchez Marketing
Present
In 08:45
Out --:--
5h 22m
LG
Laura Garcia Sales
Remote
In 08:30
Out --:--
5h 37m
Showing 3 of 42 employees ERPlora HR 
<div class="attendance-list">
  <div class="attendance-list-header">
    <div class="attendance-list-header-row">
      <h2 class="attendance-list-title">Team Attendance</h2>
      <div class="attendance-list-date">
        <input type="date" class="attendance-list-date-input" value="2026-02-07">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="attendance-list-toolbar">
    <div class="attendance-list-search">
      <svg class="attendance-list-search-icon" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
      <input type="text" class="attendance-list-search-input" placeholder="Search employees...">
    </div>
    <div class="attendance-list-filter">
      <button class="attendance-list-filter-btn attendance-list-filter-btn-active">All</button>
      <button class="attendance-list-filter-btn attendance-list-filter-btn-present">Present</button>
      <button class="attendance-list-filter-btn attendance-list-filter-btn-absent">Absent</button>
      <button class="attendance-list-filter-btn attendance-list-filter-btn-late">Late</button>
      <button class="attendance-list-filter-btn attendance-list-filter-btn-leave">Leave</button>
      <button class="attendance-list-filter-btn attendance-list-filter-btn-remote">Remote</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="attendance-list-body">
    <div class="attendance-list-item attendance-list-item-clickable">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">AM</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Ana Martinez</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">Engineering</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-present">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        Present
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">In</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">08:55</span>
        </div>
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">Out</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">--:--</span>
        </div>
        <span class="attendance-list-work-hours">5h 12m</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="attendance-list-item attendance-list-item-clickable">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">JS</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Juan Sanchez</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">Marketing</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-present">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        Present
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">In</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">08:45</span>
        </div>
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">Out</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">--:--</span>
        </div>
        <span class="attendance-list-work-hours attendance-list-work-hours-over">5h 22m</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="attendance-list-item attendance-list-item-clickable">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">LG</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Laura Garcia</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">Sales</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-remote">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        Remote
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">In</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">08:30</span>
        </div>
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-label">Out</span>
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">--:--</span>
        </div>
        <span class="attendance-list-work-hours attendance-list-work-hours-over">5h 37m</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="attendance-list-footer">
    <span>Showing 3 of 42 employees</span>
    <span>ERPlora HR</span>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div class="flex flex-col w-full overflow-hidden bg-base-100 rounded-box border border-base-300">
  <div class="flex flex-col gap-4 p-6 border-b border-base-300">
    <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
      <h2 class="font-semibold text-lg m-0">Team Attendance</h2>
      <input type="date" class="px-4 py-2 border border-base-300 rounded-field text-sm" value="2026-02-07">
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Toolbar -->
  <div class="flex items-center flex-wrap gap-4 px-6 py-2 border-b border-base-300">
    <div class="flex-1 relative min-w-50">
      <svg class="absolute left-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4.5 h-4.5 text-base-content/40 pointer-events-none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
      <input type="text" placeholder="Search employees..." class="w-full pl-9 pr-4 py-2 border border-base-300 rounded-field bg-base-200 text-sm focus:border-primary focus:bg-base-100 focus:outline-none">
    </div>
    <div class="flex items-center gap-1">
      <button class="px-2 py-0.5 border border-primary bg-primary text-primary-content rounded-full text-sm">All</button>
      <button class="px-2 py-0.5 border border-base-300 bg-base-100 text-base-content/60 rounded-full text-sm hover:bg-base-200">Present</button>
      <button class="px-2 py-0.5 border border-base-300 bg-base-100 text-base-content/60 rounded-full text-sm hover:bg-base-200">Absent</button>
      <button class="px-2 py-0.5 border border-base-300 bg-base-100 text-base-content/60 rounded-full text-sm hover:bg-base-200">Late</button>
      <button class="px-2 py-0.5 border border-base-300 bg-base-100 text-base-content/60 rounded-full text-sm hover:bg-base-200">Leave</button>
      <button class="px-2 py-0.5 border border-base-300 bg-base-100 text-base-content/60 rounded-full text-sm hover:bg-base-200">Remote</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- Items (same pattern as above) -->
  <div class="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
    <div class="flex items-center gap-4 px-6 py-4 border-b border-base-300 hover:bg-base-200 cursor-pointer transition">
      <div class="w-11 h-11 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-content flex items-center justify-center font-semibold shrink-0">AM</div>
      <div class="flex-1 min-w-0"><div class="font-medium truncate">Ana Martinez</div><div class="text-sm text-base-content/60">Engineering</div></div>
      <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-semibold uppercase bg-success/10 text-success"><span class="w-2.5 h-2.5 rounded-full bg-current"></span>Present</span>
      <div class="flex flex-col items-end text-sm tabular-nums"><span>In: 08:55</span><span>5h 12m</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// Filter buttons toggle
document.querySelectorAll('.attendance-list-filter-btn').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('.attendance-list-filter-btn').forEach(b =>
      b.classList.remove('attendance-list-filter-btn-active')
    );
    btn.classList.add('attendance-list-filter-btn-active');
    // Filter items by status
  });
});

// Search input
const searchInput = document.querySelector('.attendance-list-search-input');
searchInput?.addEventListener('input', (e) => {
  const query = e.target.value.toLowerCase();
  document.querySelectorAll('.attendance-list-item').forEach(item => {
    const name = item.querySelector('.attendance-list-name')?.textContent.toLowerCase();
    item.style.display = name?.includes(query) ? '' : 'none';
  });
});

Compact Variant

Preview

Quick View

AM
Ana Martinez Engineering
Present
08:55
5h 12m
CR
Carlos Ruiz Design
Late
09:23
4h 44m
LG
Laura Garcia Sales
Remote
08:30
5h 37m
PL
Pedro Lopez HR
Absent
--:--
JS
Juan Sanchez Marketing
Present
08:45
5h 22m 
<div class="attendance-list attendance-list-compact">
  <div class="attendance-list-header">
    <div class="attendance-list-header-row">
      <h2 class="attendance-list-title">Quick View</h2>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="attendance-list-body">
    <div class="attendance-list-item">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">AM</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Ana Martinez</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">Engineering</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-present">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        Present
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times attendance-list-times-compact">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">08:55</span>
        </div>
        <span class="attendance-list-work-hours">5h 12m</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="attendance-list-item">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">CR</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Carlos Ruiz</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">Design</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-late">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        Late
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times attendance-list-times-compact">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time attendance-list-clock-time-late">09:23</span>
        </div>
        <span class="attendance-list-work-hours attendance-list-work-hours-under">4h 44m</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="attendance-list-item">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">LG</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Laura Garcia</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">Sales</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-remote">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        Remote
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times attendance-list-times-compact">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">08:30</span>
        </div>
        <span class="attendance-list-work-hours attendance-list-work-hours-over">5h 37m</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="attendance-list-item">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">PL</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Pedro Lopez</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">HR</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-absent">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        Absent
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times attendance-list-times-compact">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">--:--</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="attendance-list-item">
      <div class="attendance-list-avatar">
        <div class="attendance-list-avatar-initials">JS</div>
      </div>
      <div class="attendance-list-info">
        <span class="attendance-list-name">Juan Sanchez</span>
        <span class="attendance-list-department">Marketing</span>
      </div>
      <span class="attendance-list-status attendance-list-status-present">
        <span class="attendance-list-status-dot"></span>
        Present
      </span>
      <div class="attendance-list-times attendance-list-times-compact">
        <div class="attendance-list-clock">
          <span class="attendance-list-clock-time">08:45</span>
        </div>
        <span class="attendance-list-work-hours attendance-list-work-hours-over">5h 22m</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: ux.min.css

<div class="border border-base-300 rounded-box overflow-hidden bg-base-100">
  <div class="divide-y divide-base-200">
    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2">
      <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-content flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-semibold shrink-0">AM</div>
      <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
        <span class="text-sm font-medium block truncate">Ana Martinez</span>
        <span class="text-xs text-base-content/50">Engineering</span>
      </div>
      <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-success/10 text-success">
        <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-success"></span>
        Present
      </span>
      <div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs tabular-nums text-base-content/60">
        <span>08:00</span>
        <span class="font-medium text-base-content">6h 07m</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-2">
      <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-error text-error-content flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-semibold shrink-0">JS</div>
      <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
        <span class="text-sm font-medium block truncate">Juan Sanchez</span>
        <span class="text-xs text-base-content/50">Marketing</span>
      </div>
      <span class="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full bg-success/10 text-success">
        <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-success"></span>
        Present
      </span>
      <div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-xs tabular-nums text-base-content/60">
        <span>08:45</span>
        <span class="font-medium text-success">5h 22m</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

Requires: tw.min.css

// No JS needed — compact is a CSS-only size variant

Classes Reference

Class Description
.attendance-listBase container with border and rounded corners
.attendance-list-compactCompact variant (smaller items and avatars)
.attendance-list-insetAdds margin around the list
.attendance-list.glassGlass morphism variant
.attendance-list-headerHeader section with title and date
.attendance-list-header-rowFlex row inside header
.attendance-list-titleList title text
.attendance-list-dateDate picker container
.attendance-list-date-inputDate input field
.attendance-list-summarySummary stats grid section
.attendance-list-statIndividual stat card
.attendance-list-stat-presentPresent stat (green value)
.attendance-list-stat-absentAbsent stat (red value)
.attendance-list-stat-lateLate stat (yellow value)
.attendance-list-stat-leaveLeave stat (blue value)
.attendance-list-stat-remoteRemote stat (secondary value)
.attendance-list-stat-valueStat number
.attendance-list-stat-labelStat label text
.attendance-list-toolbarSearch and filter toolbar
.attendance-list-searchSearch input container
.attendance-list-search-inputSearch text input
.attendance-list-search-iconSearch magnifying glass icon
.attendance-list-filterFilter buttons container
.attendance-list-filter-btnFilter pill button
.attendance-list-filter-btn-activeActive filter state
.attendance-list-filter-btn-{status}Status-colored active state: present, absent, late, leave, remote
.attendance-list-bodyScrollable items container
.attendance-list-body-fixed-heightFixed max-height (400px) body
.attendance-list-itemSingle attendance row
.attendance-list-item-clickableClickable item with active state
.attendance-list-avatarAvatar container
.attendance-list-avatar-imgAvatar image element
.attendance-list-avatar-initialsInitials fallback avatar
.attendance-list-infoName and department container
.attendance-list-nameEmployee name text
.attendance-list-departmentDepartment text
.attendance-list-statusStatus badge pill
.attendance-list-status-{type}Status color: present, absent, late, leave, remote
.attendance-list-status-dotColored dot inside status badge
.attendance-list-timesClock times and hours container
.attendance-list-times-compactHorizontal compact times layout
.attendance-list-clockClock in/out time row
.attendance-list-clock-labelIn/Out label
.attendance-list-clock-timeTime value
.attendance-list-clock-time-lateLate time highlight (warning color)
.attendance-list-work-hoursTotal work hours text
.attendance-list-work-hours-overOver target hours (green)
.attendance-list-work-hours-underUnder target hours (yellow)
.attendance-list-footerFooter with pagination info
.attendance-list-emptyEmpty state container
.attendance-list-empty-iconEmpty state icon
.attendance-list-empty-titleEmpty state title
.attendance-list-empty-textEmpty state description
